detail.description:
Blast dots. Stack upgrades. Trigger chaos.

Idle Dot Shooter is a minimalist idle shooter built for incremental idle progress. Your turret auto-fires into drifting targets while you build an upgrade engine that turns tiny pops into massive gains. Add a drone, boost suction, and unleash bullet hell abilities when you want chaos. Pure idle dot shooter gameplay - a true idle bullet hell experience.

What you do:
Shoot dots to earn cash. Spend it on Defence, Drone, and Economy upgrades. Travel to ne
detail.recentChanges:
🎮 Dot Shooters, this one's for you!
What's new:
- Rebirth at Galaxy 10 was introduced and it allows you to earn Star Dust and buy permanent upgrades that make every new run stronger;
- Rewarded ads no longer fail on long timeouts;
- Combat polish: plasma, boss damage, mortars;
- More reliable dot tracking;
Keep the feedback coming, we read every review! 🚀

eventMentions.text: pretty cool, the game plays well on my device and is very interactive. can't wait for the next updat
there are so many ads, there are also ad breaks and you need to watch ads to unlock certain new turr
uh... why is it that i exit the game for a couple hours then when i log back on everything basically
